name: Real factory section with obstacles
description: Captured from a real Factorio game. Contains a production line with drills, furnaces, and an assembler. Key challenge: belt lines with furnaces in the middle that require routing around.

blocked.comment: Burner mining drills stack at x=47-48, y=-31 to -24 (4 drills)
Stone furnace stack at x=49-50, y=-31 to -24 (4 furnaces)
Stone furnace in belt line at (51,-21) - 2x2 - KEY OBSTACLE

test_cases.name: route_around_furnace_in_belt_line
test_cases.description: Route from west side (46,-21) to east side (55,-21), must go around furnace at (50-51,-21)

test_cases.name: route_through_drill_furnace_gap
test_cases.description: Route from above the stacks (45,-32) to below (45,-18), must navigate around all obstacles

test_cases.name: route_between_stacks
test_cases.description: Route from west of drill stack (46,-28) to east of furnace stack (51,-28)

test_cases.name: blocked_start_on_furnace
test_cases.description: Start position is on a furnace tile
